notes:
Game immediately quits. Tried Proton Hotfix, Experimental, 9, GE-Proton10-25.
Manually changing the launched executable from LaunchGame.exe to EDFWB2.exe does *something* but the game still quits after about 30 seconds.

It no case did it open a window, show a splash screen or log a single line.
Running with "-log" does open the Unreal Engine log window (so something is launching), but it doesn't display anything either. Engine default configurations are created. Logs folder for the game is created but empty. No crash reports are generated.

Running with OpenGL or Vulkan both causes an UE error message to pop up saying the project wasn't built with either. This does create crash dumps.
DirectX 11 or 12 doesn't seem to make a difference.

(I can run any other Unreal Engine game just fine.)
title: EARTH DEFENSE FORCE: WORLD BROTHERS 2
